meaning: n.透视画,立体模型,西洋景
examples: Make diagrams of each diorama with labeled sketches.
Example Questions - Make a diorama of the bears' house and the forest.
I decided to add more of a story to my diorama, so I added 4 additional figures.
The usual museum diorama of our evolutionary origins features brave hunters pursuing a rearing mammoth.
"He knew exactly when he took the pictures how it was going in the diorama, " Mr. Faranda said.
